::: {.panel-tabset}

## amd64 (x86-64)

```bash
curl -Lo openme https://github.com/merlos/openme/releases/download/{{< var cli_tag_prefix >}}{{< var cli_version >}}/openme-linux-amd64
chmod +x openme
sudo mv openme /usr/local/bin/
```

## arm64

```bash
curl -Lo openme https://github.com/merlos/openme/releases/download/{{< var cli_tag_prefix >}}{{< var cli_version >}}/openme-linux-arm64
chmod +x openme
sudo mv openme /usr/local/bin/
```

## armhf

```bash
curl -Lo openme https://github.com/merlos/openme/releases/download/{{< var cli_tag_prefix >}}{{< var cli_version >}}/openme-linux-arm
chmod +x openme
sudo mv openme /usr/local/bin/
```

## 32-bit (i386)

```bash
curl -Lo openme https://github.com/merlos/openme/releases/download/{{< var cli_tag_prefix >}}{{< var cli_version >}}/openme-linux-386
chmod +x openme
sudo mv openme /usr/local/bin/
```

## riscv64

```bash
curl -Lo openme https://github.com/merlos/openme/releases/download/{{< var cli_tag_prefix >}}{{< var cli_version >}}/openme-linux-riscv64
chmod +x openme
sudo mv openme /usr/local/bin/
```

:::
